headline.text: L3 ML4 ran *3 hours down total* across quality and buffer faults — bars with low cookies caught and held, then 3rd shift buffer management learning took line offline again.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran Sollich 3 pretzel enrobing all three shifts and dialed in chocolate usage from 7g to 6g per piece by adjusting the bottomer. Sollich 2 reheated and resumed HER dark caramels by midday. Sollich 4 drain remains clogged after Roto-rooter attempt; they'll return to jet it.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 saw mold jams in the morning but the bigger hit was a PTL sensor failure overnight — twisted pins on the pressure sensor blew fuses and took the line down from 03:15 to 05:19. Sensor replaced, line back. ML3 and FFS ran clean.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 fought recurring mold camera alarms all day (chocolate buildup under hopper) plus a metal detection event where washer and nut fell from shaker hardware; all accounted for, no product impact. ML4 had bad bars with low cookie distribution around 15:01 — pallet on hold — then 3rd shift took buffer 2 below 5%, starved depositor 4, and went down 03:44 to 04:59. Truffle Line swapped the roller and fixed Cavanna 1 chain issues, back running by 13:58.

notes.text: Bequet film inventory at 21.5 rolls; Shep pickup requested for 36 pallets.
Multiple PO/receiving blocks on Peco pallets (PO8677), Tates, Mondelez chocolate, and tape — Tiffanee escalating to Ethan/Sunny.
Sensory flagged excessive vanilla flavor on One Shot Caramel from May 29 electrical interruption; samples to R&D.
Tim visiting Wednesday and Thursday — plant walk and standards focus.
ML4 learned buffer 2 needs to stay at 5% minimum; anything lower starves depositor 4 and triggers cascading alarms.
MF Matrix depositing issues continue — pouch opening suction cup not reading fully open.

resolved.title: ML2 PTL pressure sensor failure
resolved.summary: Twisted pins on 711-pt1 sensor caused fuses to blow instantly; line ran dry at 03:54 before sensor was replaced.
resolved.resolution: Sensor replaced at 04:16, PTL reached temp by 04:36, depositing restarted at 05:19 — "We're back up running" (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: ML1 metal detection event — washer and nut
resolved.summary: Metal detector triggered; two bars had visible metal (washer and nut) likely from shaker area hardware.
resolved.resolution: All pieces accounted for, hardware replaced and tightened at 22:56 — "Put back into place. I also checked and tightened all other ones" (Kavin Ayala). Line back at 23:36.

resolved.title: ML4 buffer 2 management caused PTL faults
resolved.summary: Buffer 2 dropped to 0-3%, starving depositor 4 and triggering cascading faults; line went down at 03:44 for reheat.
resolved.resolution: Reheat completed, buffer raised to 10-20% per Chad's guidance, line running at 04:59 — "We're back up running" (Kimberly Morales). Learned 5% is operational minimum.

resolved.title: Truffle Line roller replacement
resolved.summary: Roller needed for Truffle Line was machined, washed, ATP'd, and installed by maintenance.
resolved.resolution: Roller installed at 11:13, line started at 11:23 — "The line has started running" (Grey Boscan).

resolved.title: Truffle Line Cavanna 1 chain jam and belt tracking
resolved.summary: Cavanna 1 feed chain jammed and infeed belts went off track; zero position link and roller alignment issues.
resolved.resolution: Zero position link shaved and straightened, rollers aligned at 13:58 — "Cavanna 1 is now back in operation" (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: ML1 molding belt fraying on edge
resolved.summary: Molding belt fraying discovered on edge at 02:21; maintenance called to repair.
resolved.resolution: Belt fixed by maintenance at 02:43 — "ML1 is back to running, maintenance has fixed the belt" (Imperial).

resolved.title: ML4 gondola throwing chocolates at TG4 exit
resolved.summary: Gondola was ejecting chocolates at the exit for TG4; team cleaned and restarted.
resolved.resolution: Cleaned and restarted at 10:13 — "Started back up" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: ML4 depositor 2 flap repair
resolved.summary: Felix requested a 10-minute pause to fix an issue with depositor 2 flap.
resolved.resolution: Line restarted at 10:42, 12 minutes total downtime — "Line started back up at 10:42am" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: ML4 scraper piece fell off
resolved.summary: A piece fell off inside the scraper under the molds; all pieces accounted for, no product impact since scraper not in use.
resolved.resolution: Part set aside for maintenance inspection at 21:45 — "Nothing appears to be missing... no impact to the product" (Tyson Fausett).

needs_attention.title: Multiple receiving PO blocks on packaging materials
needs_attention.summary: Tiffanee unable to receive Peco pallets (PO8677 doesn't work), Mondelez chocolate, tape, and Tates — no open POs in system.
needs_attention.status: Escalated to Ethan Bean and Sunny Jagtiani multiple times; as of 16:08 still no resolution. Blocking FG label creation for item 41017.

needs_attention.title: PRS pouch shortage for Friday S3 run
needs_attention.summary: S3 scheduled to run PRS pouches (40961) on Friday; only 3,340 of 63,000 needed in stock.
needs_attention.status: Escalated to Ethan Bean, Sunny Jagtiani, Martin Carlos at 08:57. No update by window close.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 4 drain clog unresolved
needs_attention.summary: Drain clogged with caramel/ingredients; Roto-rooter attempted repair at 18:30 but couldn't clear, needs to return for jetting.
needs_attention.status: Roto-rooter unable to clear at 20:38; scheduled to return tomorrow for jetting. Marcos to coach shifts on not pushing caramel down drain.

needs_attention.title: ML2 mold jams in cooler recurring
needs_attention.summary: Mold jams in cooler caused three line stops during 1st shift between 09:18 and 12:50.
needs_attention.status: Line restarted after each jam; last restart at 12:50. Pattern suggests ongoing jamming risk but no further reports 2nd/3rd shift.

needs_attention.title: ML4 bars with low cookie distribution — pallet on hold
needs_attention.summary: Bars coming out half good/half bad around 15:01 due to low cookie distribution; team positioned at flow wrap to catch defects.
needs_attention.status: Pallet placed on hold at 15:33; Preston asked about bounding but Tyson noted some bad bars likely escaped. Product improved by 16:18 after adjustments.

needs_attention.title: ML1 recurring mold sensor alarms all day
needs_attention.summary: Mold camera alarm triggered repeatedly (10+ times) due to dirty molds and chocolate buildup under hopper back side contacting molds.
needs_attention.status: Cleaning molds and swapping with clean ones throughout shifts; buildup area under hopper cleaned at 10:17 but difficult to access. Alarms still triggering as of 04:36.

needs_attention.title: ML1 tempering instability and adjustments
needs_attention.summary: Temper spiked to 0.7 at 04:46, then multiple bad temper events requiring adjustments; crystallization being lowered in 0.2 increments.
needs_attention.status: Operators working with Robert Villarreal on crystallization adjustments; hard stop at 80.0 crystallization. Temper back in range (-0.1) by 04:51 but required active management.

needs_attention.title: ML4 dark mass in hopper requiring drain
needs_attention.summary: Mass inside hopper and inclusion turned really dark by end of 3rd shift; team drained both and started with fresh mass.
needs_attention.status: Drained and reloaded with fresh chocolate and cookies by 06:54; depositing resumed. TG5 pulled for level 3 clean, running on TG3 and TG4 only.

needs_attention.title: ML4 flow wrap jams recurring
needs_attention.summary: Multiple flow wrap jams throughout 2nd shift — at group formation (15:55), spiral entrance (16:15), and others.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance adjusted rail that was too far in at 21:06; operator noted video shows two boxes entering side by side. 5 jams total by 19:50.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix depositing issues — suction cup malfunction
needs_attention.summary: Top suctions on pouch opening not reading fully open, preventing deposit; bottom portion of suction cup not making full contact.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance notified at 20:03; still having depositing problems as of 20:59. No clear resolution posted.
